All Posts National Issues Local Campaigns Response to the attack on Jewish Londoners in Golders Green My message to our Jewish community in Leyton and Wanstead following the horrific attack on Jewish Londoners in Golders Green. Calvin Bailey MBE MP 3 days ago Marking the Month of the Military Child I was proud to host a reception in Parliament marking the Month of the Military Child, bringing together the Royal British Legion, Never Such Innocence, parliamentarians, and young people from Armed Forces families. National Issues Calvin Bailey MBE MP 4 days ago My London Marathon 2026 run for Samaritans A big thank you to everyone who supported my London Marathon run last weekend! Finished in 03:26 and even got my medal from Dawn Butler MP. I ran for the Samaritans, to show support for our wonderful Waltham Forest branch. Calvin Bailey MBE MP 5 days ago Raising antisemitic attacks in Parliament Over recent days, London’s Jewish communities have been targeted by a wave of antisemitic attacks. We must stand together against this insidious racist violence. Calvin Bailey MBE MP Apr 24 calvin.bailey.mp@parliament.uk ​ 0207 219 7417 Email: ​ Phone: Follow Calvin on Social Media: GET IN TOUCH Calvin is Chair of the All Party Parliamentary Group for the Armed Forces Community.
